description: Contract for promoting minimized incident repro packages into durable regression proofs or explicit blocked work items while preserving oracle, provenance, minimizer summary, feature flags, redaction policy, and rch proof commands.

promotion_policy.unit_test: crash-pack, cancellation, obligation, or quiescence repros with rch proof commands become normal unit-level regressions
promotion_policy.integration_test: trace-log, support-bundle, or rch proof failures become integration tests when the preserved command is executable through rch
promotion_policy.golden_artifact: claim-drift/readme failures become deterministic golden artifacts
promotion_policy.fuzz_seed: trace/crash repro material may become a seed only if its deterministic seed identity is not already committed
promotion_policy.fixture_only: operator-approved repros that are deterministic but not directly executable remain redacted fixtures
promotion_policy.blocker_bead: unsupported or stale repro material records an explicit follow-up bead instead of silently downgrading

proof_commands: rch exec -- rustfmt --edition 2024 --check src/trace/incident.rs src/trace/mod.rs tests/incident_replay_promotion.rs

rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_incident_replay_promotion CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test incident_replay_promotion --features test-internals -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_incident_replay_promotion_check CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo check -p asupersync --test incident_replay_promotion --features test-internals
